title: Thermo Fisher SampleManager Sample
description: A laboratory sample record in the Thermo Scientific SampleManager LIMS system.

status.description: Sample status: A=Authorized, C=Completed, X=Cancelled, L=Login pending.

sampled_date.description: Date the sample was collected or received.

customer.description: Customer identity associated with the sample.

product.description: Product or material identity associated with the sample.

analysis.description: Analysis template assigned to the sample.

due_date.description: Due date for completing sample results.

login_date.description: Date and time the sample was logged into the system.

logged_in_by.description: Username who logged the sample into the system.
